It uses strict mode, imports `tslib` for helper functions, and includes a source map comment. No user input, network calls, or data handling is present.\n\n---\n\n### Review of Each Report\n\n---\n\n**Report 1:**\n\n- **Summary:** Re-exporting all from `./typeorm-seeding`; benign, no malicious activity.\n- **Scores:** malware=0, obfuscated=0, securityRisk=0, confidence=1\n\n**Assessment:**  \nThis aligns perfectly with the code.
